name: Chicken with caramelized onion & cardamom rice

ingredients.item: 2 medium onions, thinly sliced (2 cups / 250 g in total)
ingredients.original: 2 medium onions, thinly sliced (2 cups / 250 g in total)

ingredients.item: 2¼ lb / 1 kg skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs, or 1 whole chicken, quartered
ingredients.original: 2¼ lb / 1 kg skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs, or 1 whole chicken, quartered

ingredients.item: 2 long cinnamon sticks, broken in two
ingredients.original: 2 long cinnamon sticks, broken in two

ingredients.item: 1½ tbsp / 5 g flat-leaf parsley leaves, chopped
ingredients.original: 1½ tbsp / 5 g flat-leaf parsley leaves, chopped

ingredients.item: ½ cup / 5 g dill leaves, chopped
ingredients.original: ½ cup / 5 g dill leaves, chopped

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 5 g cilantro leaves, chopped

ingredients.item: ⅓ cup / 100 g Greek yogurt, mixed with 2 tbsp olive oil (optional)
